docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-11-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT SUMMERS, MARSHA AN INDIVIDUAL QUANTUM MEDICAL SOLUTIONS, INC

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS MARSHA SUMMERS, AND QUANTUM MEDICAL SOLUTIONS, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO MARIN COUNTY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS MARSHA SUMMERS, AND QUANTUM MEDICAL SOLUTIONS, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR VIOLATION OF COURT ORDER; FOR SANCTIONS; AND FOR A DETERMINATION THAT DEFENDANT IS THE PREVAILING PARTY AND ENTITLED TO ATTORNEYS FEES IS GRANTED. CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 399(A) IN LIGHT OF NON-PAYMENT OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND ON CONDITION THAT NO OTHER ACTION ON THIS CAUSE MAY BE COMMENCED IN ANOTHER COURT PRIOR TO SATISFACTION OF THE FEES OWED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
